zh.lifeSummary: 當Melette de Dinan於1128年出生在澤西島隆維爾時，她的父親Alain de Dinan40歲，母親Eléonore de Penthièvre36歲。她於1158年5月8日與Walter de Cantilupe在英國巴金哈姆爾結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1200年在英國英格蘭享年72歲。

zh-hans.Ellesborough, Buckinghamshire, England: 英国英格兰巴金哈姆爾艾勒斯波洛
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Melette de Dinan于1128年出生在泽西岛隆維爾时，她的父亲Alain de Dinan40岁，母亲Eléonore de Penthièvre36岁。她于1158年5月8日与Walter de Cantilupe在英国巴金哈姆爾结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1200年在英国英格兰享年72岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Dinan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Irish (now mainly counties Clare and Cork): shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Daghnáin ‘descendant of Daghnán’, possibly a diminutive of dagh ‘good’.
French: habitational name from Dinan, in Côtes-d'Armor, Brittany. This surname is very rare in France.

variants.name: Dineen
meanings: Irish (Cork and Limerick): shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Duinnín ‘descendant of Duinnín’, a byname from a diminutive of donn ‘brown-haired man’ or ‘chieftain’.

nameMeanings.name: Melette
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Francois, Emilien, Laurent, Marcel, Yvon.

Americanized form of French Milet: from the ancient Germanic personal name Milo, based on the element mil, from mel ‘good, generous’. Altered ending reflects the Canadian and American French practice of sounding the final -t.

en.lifeSummary: When Melette de Dinan was born in 1128, in Longueville, Jersey, her father, Alain de Dinan, was 40 and her mother, Eléonore de Penthièvre, was 36. She married Walter de Cantilupe on 8 May 1158, in Buckinghamshire, England. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 1 daughter. She died in 1200, in England, United Kingdom, at the age of 72.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Melette de Dinan est née en 1128, à Longueville, Jersey, son père, Alain de Dinan, avait 40 ans et sa mère, Eléonore de Penthièvre, avait 36 ans. Elle a épousé Walter de Cantilupe le 8 mai 1158, à Buckinghamshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1200, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 72 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Melette de Dinan 1128 in Longueville, Jersey geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Alain de Dinan 40 und ihre Mutter Eléonore de Penthièvre 36. Sie hat am 8. Mai 1158 in Buckinghamshire, England Walter de Cantilupe geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1200 im Alter von 72 Jahren in England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Melette de Dinan è nata il nel 1128 nel Longueville, Jersey, sua padre, Alain de Dinan, aveva 40 anni e sua madre, Eléonore de Penthièvre, aveva 36 anni. Lei sposato Walter de Cantilupe il 8 maggio 1158, nel Buckinghamshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1200, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 72 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Melette de Dinanが1128年にジャージーロングエヴィルで生まれた時，父Alain de Dinanは40歳，母Eléonore de Penthièvreは36歳であった。1158年5月8日にイギリスブクインガムシュアイアでWalter de Cantilupeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1200年にイギリスイギリスで72歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Melette de Dinan(이)가 1128년 저지 론구에빌에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Alain de Dinan(은)는 40세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Eléonore de Penthièvre(은)는 36세였다. 그녀는 1158년 5월 8일 영국 벅잉함실르에서 Walter de Cantilupe(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1200년 영국 잉글랜드에서 72세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.Ellesborough, Buckinghamshire, England: Ellesborough, Buccingahamscir, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Melette de Dinan nasceu em 1128, em Longueville, Jérsei, seu pai, Alain de Dinan, tinha 40 anos e sua mãe, Eléonore de Penthièvre, tinha 36 anos. Ela casou-se com Walter de Cantilupe em 8 de maio de 1158, em Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1200, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 72 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Melette de Dinan родилась в 1128 г. в местности лонгуевилл, Джерси, её отцу по имени Alain de Dinan было 40 лет, а матери, которую звали Eléonore de Penthièvre, 36. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Walter de Cantilupe 8 мая 1158 г. в местности буккингхамшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1200 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 72 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Melette de Dinan nació en 1128, en Longueville, Jersey, su papá, Alain de Dinan, tenía 40 años y su mamá, Eléonore de Penthièvre, tenía 36 años. Se casó con Walter de Cantilupe el 8 de mayo de 1158, en Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1200, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 72 años.
